title: IJIM JJIM-D-25-02826 Major Revision Package
description: Address all reviewer comments (R1, R2, AE) for the manuscript 'Does AI Benefit All Platform Stakeholders?' and produce a complete revision package: response letter + revised manuscript + supporting analyses. Submission deadline 2026-05-30. All originals (manuscript.docx, review.docx, raw csv, RData) must be preserved untouched. All deliverables go to new folders.

verifiedManuscriptSpec.ddd_formula: y ~ After:Treat:prof_low + After:Treat:prof_med + After:Treat:prof_high + After:prof_med + After:prof_high | rider_id + station_date | 0 | rider_id
verifiedManuscriptSpec.buffer_filter: NONE — use full 14,102 day rows / 153,190 shift rows
verifiedManuscriptSpec.verification: code/04_manuscript_exact_spec.R reproduces all manuscript Table 4-7 coefficients to 3-4 decimal places

stories.title: Manuscript Table 4-7 정확 재현 (완료)
stories.description: RData baseline 으로 Table 4-7 의 모든 manuscript 계수 정확 일치 검증. 핵심: spec이 02_DID matching.R 의 ln() spec과 다르고, LINEAR + rider_id cluster + no buffer filter.
acceptanceCriteria: ✅ T5 idle DDD low +0.566**, med -0.583** 정확 일치
✅ docs/03_evidence_log.md 에 verified 수치 + spec 정리

stories.title: Event-study (dynamic DID with leads/lags)
stories.description: Reviewer 1 #3A + R2 #7 address. AI rollout (2020-10-26) 기준 week-level lead/lag 회귀로 pre-trend 검증 + dynamic effect 추정. 데이터의 wb5/wb4/.../w5 dummies 사용 가능.
acceptanceCriteria: Spec: y ~ Treat:wb4 + Treat:wb3 + Treat:wb2 + Treat:w1 + Treat:w2 + ... + Treat:w5 | rider_id + station_date | 0 | rider_id (wb1 omitted as reference)
Pre-trend F-test 결과 보고 (joint test of wb4, wb3, wb2 = 0)
output/interpretation/05_event_study.md 에 (i) pre-trend, (ii) post-AI dynamics, (iii) 그룹별 패턴 정리

stories.title: Oster (2019) bound on unobservable selection
stories.description: R1 #3C + R2 #8 + AE-4 address. Oster delta* 로 unobservable confounders 가 결과를 뒤집기 위해 필요한 selection 강도 정량화.
acceptanceCriteria: Main DID spec (orders_per_hour ~ After:Treat) 에 대해 Oster delta* 계산
output/interpretation/06_oster_bounds.md 에 결과 + reviewer address 정리

stories.title: Dose-response on AI adoption intensity (supplementary)
stories.description: R1 #3B address. Ever-adopter binary 보완. AI assignment intensity (share_aiorder, daily share_aiorders) 연속변수 회귀.
acceptanceCriteria: Productivity 에 대한 dose-response 회귀 (linear + binscatter)

stories.title: Stable workers robustness
stories.description: R1 #3C + R2 #8 address. 양 기간 active rider 만 retain.
acceptanceCriteria: Stability rule (예: 양 기간 ≥7 working days) 코드 주석에 명시
Main DID + DDD 결과가 stable sample 에서도 일관성 있는지 비교

stories.title: Inequality metrics (Gini, Theil, P90/P10)
stories.description: R1 Minor #2 address. Subgroup DDD 외에 직접 inequality metric.
acceptanceCriteria: Pre vs post 두 기간에 대해 productivity 분포의 Gini, Theil, P90/P10 계산

stories.title: Learning dynamics (week-level treatment evolution)
stories.description: R2 #9 address. 'Learning curve' empirical evidence. Week-level treatment coefficient 진화 (그룹별).
acceptanceCriteria: Post-AI w1, w2, w3, w4, w5 에 대해 그룹별 (low/med/high) coefficient 추정

stories.title: Worker–customer linkage
stories.description: AE #2 address. Stack-level worker productivity ↔ customer waiting time 의 연결. formal mediation 회피.
acceptanceCriteria: Stack-level: avg_waiting ~ num_orders (productivity proxy) + controls | rider + station_date + hourDOW

stories.title: Submission diagnostics (representativeness + MDE)
stories.description: R2 #6 + R1 #4 address. Analytic sample 의 대표성 + design-based MDE.
acceptanceCriteria: Analytic full sample (336 매칭 라이더) vs all active Busan 라이더 (data_order의 584 라이더 또는 더 큰 비교군) 의 4가지 변수 (orders/hour, daily orders, labor hours, fee) 비교

stories.title: Long-term extension (Dec-Feb 데이터 통합)
stories.description: AE #4 + R2 #7 address. data/raw/recommendation_data_busan_exclusive_dec_feb.csv 통합한 extended event-study.
acceptanceCriteria: Dec-Feb csv 와 main RData 의 schema 호환성 검증 + mapping 코드 주석
통합 데이터셋의 sample size, 관찰 기간 보고
1-month vs extended sample coefficient 비교 표

stories.title: Manuscript revision draft (Section 1: Introduction)
stories.description: R1-1, R1-2, R2-1, R2-2 address. Sharper novelty + AI vs algorithmic dispatch + tone-down + customer-side 병렬.
acceptanceCriteria: Multi-stage task structure (assignment → stacking → sequencing → routing) 가 boundary condition 으로 명시
AI 시스템 정의 (revealed preference learning, dynamic match scoring) 명확화
Worker stress / algorithmic bias 가능성 언급
Customer-side question 이 worker-side 와 병렬 배치
manuscript_revised/changelog.md 업데이트 (변경 이유 + 매핑된 reviewer 코멘트 ID)

stories.title: Manuscript revision draft (Section 2: Related Literature)
stories.description: R2-4, R2-5, R1-Minor-1 address.
acceptanceCriteria: Competing views (AI raises vs reduces inequality) 비판적 검토
Platform-specific 인용 (Knight 2024, Y. Chen 2024, M. Liu 2021, Mao 2025, Gupta 2022) 강조
Y. Chen et al. (2024a/b) 중복 단일화

stories.title: Manuscript revision draft (Section 3: Background)
stories.description: R1-2, AE-3 address.
acceptanceCriteria: AI 시스템의 (i) revealed preference learning, (ii) dynamic match scoring, (iii) automated assignment 명시 + manual broadcast 와 차별화
AE-3: '사회적 형평이 시스템 설계 목표 아니었음' 명시

stories.title: Manuscript revision draft (Section 4: Empirical Models)
stories.description: R1-Minor-3, R1-3 address.
acceptanceCriteria: FE 와 clustering level 명시 (rider_id + station_date, cluster rider_id)

stories.title: Manuscript revision draft (Section 5: Results)
stories.description: R1-Minor-2, R1-4, AE-2, R2-6,7,8,9 address.
acceptanceCriteria: 5.1: 기존 + Gini/Theil/P90-P10 inequality metric 본문 포함
5.2: 'customers served by treated/matched riders' 로 estimand 한정 + worker-customer linkage 결과 (mediation 단어 회피)
5.3: Event-study + Oster + stable workers + extended long-term + representativeness 모두 포함

stories.title: Manuscript revision draft (Section 6: Discussion + Section 7: Conclusion)
stories.description: R2-3, R2-10, R2-11 address.
acceptanceCriteria: Section 7 4개 sub-section: theoretical contribution, practical implication, limitation, future research
Limitation: single country / single platform / single task / short window / residual selection 명시

stories.title: Skill → Proficiency 일괄 교체 + Claims-to-avoid 점검
stories.description: AE-1 address + final pass.
acceptanceCriteria: 'formal mediation', 'platform-wide consumer welfare', 'AI promotes social equality', 'low-skilled workers benefited the most', 'single-order waiting time improved' (headline) 모두 0회
docs/04_claims_audit.md 에 grep 결과 + 점검 표

stories.title: Reference audit
stories.description: R1-Minor-1 address.
acceptanceCriteria: Y. Chen et al. (2024a/b) 중복 → 단일 entry
Allon et al. (2018) SSRN → final published version 검색 결과
Brynjolfsson et al. (2025) 제목 trailing '*' 제거
본문 인용된 모든 reference 가 list 에 존재 + 모든 list reference 가 본문에 인용

stories.title: Response letter v1
stories.description: Reviewer 1 (1-1 ~ Minor-3), Reviewer 2 (1 ~ 11), Associate Editor (1 ~ 4) 각 코멘트에 numbered response.
acceptanceCriteria: 25개 reviewer 코멘트 모두 매핑된 numbered response
각 response: (i) 원 코멘트 인용, (ii) 응답, (iii) manuscript 변경 위치, (iv) 새 evidence
docs/01_reviewer_comments_mapped.md 의 모든 ID 가 response_letter_v1.md 에 등장

stories.title: Submission readiness check
stories.description: 최종 점검.
acceptanceCriteria: manuscript_revised/, response/, output/, docs/ 산출물 존재
본문 모든 숫자가 output/tables/ 와 일치

completionCriteria: 원본 파일 (manuscript .docx, review .docx, raw csv, RData) 모두 미수정
Response letter + revised manuscript + 모든 supporting analysis 가 정합적

metadata.reproductionStatus: VERIFIED — manuscript Table 4-7 모든 계수 0.001 단위까지 일치
metadata.verificationStatus: All 21 stories passed; originals unchanged; 9 new analyses + 7 manuscript sections + response letter complete; body-table consistency verified across all spot checks; manuscript p=0.026 reproduced via LOG spec test (p=0.0217)
